basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Officer, Research Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Research Officer, Research Assistant, Secretarial Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has released the official notification for 3 Research Officer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD (preferred in science), PG (preferred in science), Graduate
qualification.details: Research Officer: PhD (preferred in science) Research Assistant: PG (preferred in science) Secretarial Assistant: Graduate

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 is 26 May 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Officer post in the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026. This is a great opportunity for eligible candidates to join the prestigious institution.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Officer position?
faq.answer: For the Research Officer position, candidates are required to have a PhD, preferably in a science discipline. This indicates a strong emphasis on research and academic background for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Officer post?
faq.answer: The Research Officer position at IIT Guwahati offers a monthly salary of Rs. 67000. This is a competitive salary package for a research-oriented role.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the posts at IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati has announced a total of 3 vacancies for various posts, including Research Officer, Research Assistant, and Secretarial Assistant, as part of this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039. This recruitment is specifically for candidates in Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Are these permanent government jobs?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contract. While it offers a stable opportunity, it is important to note that these are contract-based positions and not permanent government jobs.
